name: Recent Install - Empathy Under Distress
description: Distressed recent-install caller; tone and safety handling.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: My hybrid system just failed on the highway with my kids in the car right after your install - I'm freaking out.
expectedOutcome: Agent leads with genuine empathy, addresses any immediate safety concern by directing to emergency/roadside services (no medical/mechanical safety advice), then guides through next warranty steps calmly.
